sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers the full B2 passive arsenal: classic passive rappel, forme pronominale à sens passif (se vendre comme des petits pains, se visiter), se faire / se voir / se laisser + infinitif (with invariable fait/laissé) — themed on urban transformation debates (patrimoine vs modernité). Spirals from b1.1/unit-07-passive. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 3 'Domicile' ('Le passif', p.45 incl. se voir/s'entendre/se faire/se laisser; thème: transformations urbaines). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
